title: Generate varlink API documentation automatically
body:
Using varlink's idl parser, we generate API documentation for the podman
API relying on the .varlink file as the source.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 21ebdb5) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
